profile.headline: Full-Stack Developer
profile.summary: Experienced developer specialised in modern frontend architecture, reusable component systems, and scalable web applications.

experiences.summary: Led the front-end architecture of a customer-facing banking portal serving 2M+ users. Built and maintained a shared design system consumed by five product teams across two business units.
Developed e-commerce features and back-office tools for the Intermarché digital platform. Introduced end-to-end testing practices and reduced regression rates by 60% over two release cycles.
Delivered interactive web experiences for luxury brand clients including premium campaign microsites and editorial platforms for international audiences.
Built internal web tools for the digital transformation programme. Contributed to the migration of legacy intranet applications to modern React-based interfaces.

projects.title: MyUI — Component Library
projects.summary: A reusable React component library built with GSAP animations and SCSS. Distributed as an internal workspace package and consumed across multiple product applications.

projects.title: Portal — Customer Dashboard
projects.summary: Next.js application providing self-service capabilities for enterprise customers. Server-side rendered, fully accessible, and internationalised for six markets.

projects.title: Folio — Experimental 3D Frontend
projects.summary: A creative frontend experiment exploring WebGL and Three.js for immersive brand storytelling, built for a luxury client campaign and deployed as a standalone microsite.

education.degree: Master of Engineering — Computer Science & Distributed Systems
